## 🔧 How To Complete Remaining 6 Files

### Simple 3-Step Process (Repeat 6 times):

**Step 1**: Open file (e.g., frm_Banhang.java)  
**Step 2**: Find and DELETE auto-generated code block:
```
@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
// <editor-fold defaultstate="collapsed" desc="Generated Code">//GEN-BEGIN:initComponents
private void initComponents() {
    // ... DELETE EVERYTHING HERE ...
}//GEN-END:initComponents
```

**Step 3**: Replace with manual initComponents() (minimal version is OK)

**Test**: Build project (Ctrl+Shift+B) and delete .form file if present

## 🎓 Pattern Summary (All 7 Views Follow This)

```java
public class ViewName extends JPanel {
    // 1. Component declarations as private fields
    private JLabel label1, label2;
    private JButton btn1;
    private JTable table1;
    
    // 2. Constructor calls initComponents()
    public ViewName() {
        initComponents();
        loadData();  // Load from database
    }
    
    // 3. initComponents() with null layout + setBounds()
    private void initComponents() {
        setLayout(null);
        
        label1 = new JLabel("Text");
        label1.setBounds(x, y, w, h);
        add(label1);
        
        // ... more components
    }
    
    // 4. All business logic methods (unchanged)
    private void loadData() { }
    private void saveData() { }
    
    // 5. Event handlers using method references
    button.addActionListener(e -> handleClick(e));
}
```
